title: QUANTUM FLUID MECHANICS AND QUANTUM ELECTRODYNAMICS
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Lt
abstract: The commutation relations of Landau quantum fluid mechanics are compared with those of quantum electrodynamics. In both cases, the operator representation of the commutators require a macroscopic phase, and a wavefunction periodic in that phase. A physical discussion is given for analogous effects in superfluids and superconductors, with regard to quantum coherence on a macroscopic scale. Other applications are then briefly described.
